overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game showing the player entering the Thestral Stables. The player opens a large medieval wooden door, walks through a stone corridor with arched ceilings, and approaches the skeletal winged creatures (Thestrals) inside the dimly lit stable.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior entrance to gothic stone stable

events.description: large wooden door with iron hinges opens, revealing the stable interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the heavy wooden entrance door and opening it to enter the Thestral Stables

entered.detail: heavy oak door with ornate wrought iron hinges and metal handles
gothic stone arch framing the stable entrance
stone wall covered in green ivy vines

segments.scene_description: Standing outside the Thestral Stables, the player faces a large medieval wooden door set within a stone archway. Ivy climbs the right wall as the player approaches and opens the heavy door, revealing the dim interior beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stable corridor with arched ceilings

events.description: transition from natural exterior light to dimmer interior lighting of the stone stable

agents.ego_description: walking down the stone corridor deeper into the stable, approaching the creatures in the distance

notable_agents.action: thestral standing stationary near the back wall of the stable

entered.detail: long corridor with high vaulted stone ceilings and supporting columns
ornate iron stand with hanging lanterns
large wooden wagon wheel leaning against a wooden partition

segments.scene_description: Having entered the stable, the player walks down a stone corridor with arched ceilings. An iron lantern stand stands to the left while a wooden cart wheel rests against the right wall. In the distance, a skeletal winged creature (thestral) is visible standing in the shadows.

agents.ego_description: approaching the thestral to observe it up close as the creature turns its head toward the player

notable_agents.action: thestral turning its head to look toward the player
second thestral visible in the background near the far wall

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the thestral, which stands tethered in the stable. The skeletal winged creature turns its head to regard the player as they draw near. A second thestral is visible in the background against the far stone wall, and the wooden cart wheel is now to the right.

events.description: camera turns right toward a side wooden door in the stone wall

agents.ego_description: moving past the thestral and turning right toward a side exit door in the stone wall

entered.detail: smaller wooden door with iron studs set in the stone wall
stone archway framing the side exit door

segments.scene_description: Moving past the thestral, the player turns right toward a smaller wooden door set into the stone wall. The camera focuses on this side exit door as the player approaches it, leaving the main stable area behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the bright exterior of the Thestral Stables into a dimly lit, cavernous interior. It begins outside a large medieval wooden door set in a stone archway draped with ivy, moving forward as the heavy door swings open to reveal a dark hallway. As the camera advances down the stone corridor past an iron lantern and a wooden cart wheel, the space opens up to reveal a skeletal winged thestral standing in the shadows. The scene then shifts closer to the creature, which turns its head to regard the player while a second thestral remains visible against the far stone wall. Finally, the camera moves past the creatures and turns right, focusing on a smaller wooden side door set into the masonry as the main stable area is left behind.
